title: acaena elongata
intro: Acaena elongata, also known as red button, is a perennial flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia, characterized by its small, red or pink flowers and distinctive red or orange berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Acaena elongata include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Acaena elongata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
